behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC Tarna's short examination response, area-triggered behavior adjustments, scheduled patrol spawning, and the primary dialogue/interaction handler.
TARNA::look (examine) chooses whether to label Tarna by name or as a generic 'guard' and issues a short bark (displayed text) to the examining player.

TARNA::enterFastArea and TARNA::leaveFastArea manage fast-area entry/exit semantics: enterFastArea sets Tarna's activity to a default when available, and leaveFastArea cleans up per-process area info.
TARNA::schedule chooses and spawns a movement/behavior METHOD (patrol) based on world state and a random/choice utility, but is suppressed if Toran is dead or Tarna is dead.

TARNA::use builds a context-sensitive dialogue menu from many global story flags, issues appropriate barks (including urgent 'Titan' warnings when certain counters are high), may spawn behavior/animation methods, and persistently records that Tarna knows the player's name when applicable.
notable_control_flow: Examine (Event 0) -> TARNA::look: read tarnaName global flag to decide label and call Item::bark(pid, string, this).
Area entry -> U8P_TARNA::TARNA::enterFastArea: abort early if toranDead or Npc::isDead(); otherwise call Npc::cSetActivity(pid, 0, this).
Area exit -> U8P_TARNA::TARNA::leaveFastArea: call FREE::2A56 to free stored per-process area info.

Scheduling path -> U8P_TARNA::TARNA::schedule: if Tarna alive and toranDead is false, repeatedly call FREE::28F9 (choice/random) to pick a schedule variant and spawn METHOD::133F with chosen parameters.

Use/Conversation -> U8P_TARNA::TARNA::use: compute an urgency counter from hydrosFree/pyrosFree/hasHeart; if high, bark an urgent line and spawn METHOD::1090; otherwise assemble an slist menu using flags (tarnaMet, tarnaAvaName, devonInRule, hasBreath, saidOrlok, tarnaJob, tarnaTenebraed), present it via Item::ask, interpret player replies (string comparisons), issue barks, spawn follow-up METHODS (METHOD::0BCF, METHOD::1090), and set tarnaName when the player gives their name.
open_questions: Exact mapping of schedule variants to world locations/waypoints used by METHOD::133F (details of parameters chosen after FREE::28F9 are inferred but not explicit).
Precise text and full set of menu strings appended to slist (some strings and their exact branching are inferred rather than exhaustively enumerated).
Whether U8P_TARNA::TARNA::schedule is ever invoked directly from U8P_TARNA::TARNA::use or only from NPC init/idle logic (no explicit direct call proven in the excerpt).
The exact meaning and format of the per-process info object allocated on enterFastArea (structure used by FREE::2A56 on leave) is not fully specified.

main_function.name: U8P_TARNA::look
main_function.purpose: Handle an immediate 'U8P_TARNA::look' (examine) event for the NPC Tarna: choose whether to display her proper name or a generic 'guard' label and emit a short bark to the examining player.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_TARNA::look) — invoked when the player examines or 'looks at' the NPC

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::look
function_map.role: Provides the NPC's examine/short-description response and issues a bark to the examining player.

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::schedule
function_map.role: Decide and spawn a scheduled patrol/behavior METHOD (METHOD::133F) based on random choice and world state; suppressed if toranDead or NPC is dead.

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Triggered when an actor enters Tarna's fast-area: if available, set Tarna's activity to a default and record per-process area info.

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Triggered on fast-area exit: clear/free per-process area info created on entry.

function_map.name: U8P_TARNA::use
function_map.role: Primary dialogue/interaction handler (Event 1): build dialogue menus from many global flags, handle replies, issue barks, spawn follow-ups, and set persistent knowledge flags like tarnaName.

internal_calls.purpose: Possibly spawn or refresh scheduled behavior after conversation ends (inferred; scheduling logic exists but direct call from use is not confirmed in the snippet).

external_calls.purpose: Display the NPC's short examine text to the player (e.g., 'Tarna' or 'guard').
Choose among schedule/patrol variants (random/choice utility) to determine parameters for spawning METHOD::133F.
Spawn the chosen patrol/movement/behavior routine for Tarna with selected parameters.
Check whether Tarna is dead; if so, abort area-entry behavior.
Set Tarna's activity state (activity 0) when the player enters the fast-area and Tarna is available.
Free/clear stored per-process area info set on entry (cleanup).
Emit dialogue lines / greetings / information lines during conversation.
Spawn a short method at use() start, likely to animate or prepare Tarna for conversation.
Spawn a follow-up method after urgent barks to animate or continue Tarna's urgent response.
Present the built dialogue/choice list (slist) to the player and receive their selection.
Retrieve the player's name to personalize greetings when tarnaAvaName is set.
Check Tarna's current map ID to route map-specific dialogue branches (e.g., devonInRule behavior).

reads.name: toranDead
reads.likely_effect: Suppress scheduling and area-entry behaviors; if true, Tarna won't spawn patrols or change behavior on area entry.

reads.name: tarnaName
reads.likely_effect: Decide whether to display Tarna's proper name versus a generic 'guard' label and influence greeting phrasing.

reads.name: tarnaMet
reads.likely_effect: Gate whether Tarna runs an initial 'met' introduction branch versus a repeat greeting; used to spawn a special method when unset.

reads.name: tarnaAvaName
reads.likely_effect: If set, make Tarna use the avatar/player's name in greetings (triggers getName()).

reads.name: tarnaJob
reads.likely_effect: If unset, add 'Tell me about your job' to the information menu options.

reads.name: tarnaTenebraed
reads.likely_effect: Gate the presence of a 'Tell me about Tenebrae' information option in the dialogue menu.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Increment an internal urgency counter contributing to an urgent/titan response when combined with other flags.

reads.name: pyrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Increment the urgency counter used to decide an alarmed bark branch.

reads.name: hasHeart
reads.likely_effect: Contribute to the urgency counter and influence whether the 'Titans' urgent branch triggers.

reads.name: hasBreath
reads.likely_effect: Gate certain informational replies (e.g., whether healing-related topics are valid).

reads.name: devonInRule
reads.likely_effect: When true (and possibly map-specific), Tarna refuses to provide information because she is busy, changing dialogue flow.

reads.name: saidOrlok
reads.likely_effect: Gate adding the 'Who is Orlok?' information option to the dialogue menu.

writes.name: tarnaName
writes.likely_effect: Set when the player tells Tarna their name; records that Tarna 'knows' the player and changes subsequent greeting phrasing.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC Tarna's short examination response, area-triggered behavior adjustments, scheduled patrol spawning, and the primary dialogue/interaction handler.
